role: This directory serves as the central repository of template artifacts governing the ArchSpine mirror system's identity, prompt construction, architectural rules, and external documentation views.
responsibility: Collectively, these templates provide the foundational artifacts for the ArchSpine system: governance documents, AI prompt building blocks, architectural rules and conventions, and high-level documentation views that define the system's external contract and surface maintenance risks.

children.role: Core documentation and governance artifacts defining the ArchSpine mirror system's identity, rules, and configuration.

This directory contains prompt template building blocks for the ArchSpine mirror system, including factories for architecture diagram prompts, reusable markdown block rendering, example role descriptions, schema definitions, and a unified export point.
This directory contains governance rules and conventions for the ArchSpine project, encompassing layered architecture boundaries and naming standards.
This directory aggregates high-level documentation views that define the system's external contract and surface critical maintenance risks.
